utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Check for full specification with costs: 1) health_coverage: includes plan name and monthly_cost (cost provided) and indicates mental health support; acceptable as 'physical and mental health insurance with costs'—count as fully specified. 2) property_coverage: includes plan name, monthly_cost, coverage_limit; matches 'home/contents insurance with costs'—count as fully specified. 3) travel_coverage: includes plan name and monthly_cost; matches 'travel insurance with costs'—count as fully specified. 4) additional_services: includes a service name and one_time_cost; matches 'any enhancement services with costs'—count as fully specified. 5) total_budget: includes monthly_total and annual_total; provides breakdown elements—count as fully specified. Therefore 5/5 items are included and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists three insurance plans and one additional service. I matched each named plan to the corresponding entry in the ground-truth ratings. The matches are: LifeFirst Standard Plan under primary health coverage (physical_health) with rating 8; EliteHome Premium Coverage under property_protection (home_content) with rating 10; EliteTravel Premium Plan under mobility_coverage (travel_insurance) with rating 10. The 'Secure Family Financial Passport' additional service does not exist in the ground-truth ratings, so it is not included in the RATINGS mapping.
